content.question: Is the stagnant capacity in six- and eight-year tracks a deliberate policy outcome to reduce demand, a consequence of genuine facility/teacher shortages, or a combination of both?
content.reduction_path: Obtain and analyze Ministry of Education budget allocations, staffing plans, and capacity-expansion proposals for 2020–2026; cross-reference with documented policy statements on vocational-training enrollment targets to determine whether capacity stagnation reflects policy intent or constrained resources.
